revision.text: * [[Template:Title year]] * [[Template:Title year+1]] * [[Template:Title year-1]] * [[Template:Title year range]] * [[Template:Title year2range]] * [[Template:Title year2range+1]] * [[Template:Title year2range-1]] * [[Template:Title monthname]] * [[Template:Title decade]] * [[Template:Title century]] * [[Template:Title number]] * [[Template:Make YYYY–YY]] * [[Template:Century name from title year]] * [[Template:Century name from title decade]] * [[Template:Century name from decade or year]]<noinclude> {{Documentation}} </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: convert local/ILL link → enwiki interwiki

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text: * [[Template:Title year]] * [[:en:Template:Title year+1|Template:Title year+1]] * [[:en:Template:Title year-1|Template:Title year-1]] * [[:en:Template:Title year range|Template:Title year range]] * [[:en:Template:Title year2range|Template:Title year2range]] * [[:en:Template:Title year2range+1|Template:Title year2range+1]] * [[:en:Template:Title year2range-1|Template:Title year2range-1]] * [[:en:Template:Title monthname|Template:Title monthname]] * [[Template:Title decade]] * [[Template:Title century]] * [[:en:Template:Title number|Template:Title number]] * [[:en:Template:Make YYYY–YY|Template:Make YYYY–YY]] * [[Template:Century name from title year]] * [[Template:Century name from title decade]] * [[Template:Century name from decade or year]]<noinclude> {{Documentation}} </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text: * [[Template:Title year]] * [[:en:Template:Title year+1|Template:Title year+1]] * [[:en:Template:Title year-1|Template:Title year-1]] * [[:en:Template:Title year range|Template:Title year range]] * [[:en:Template:Title year2range|Template:Title year2range]] * [[:en:Template:Title year2range+1|Template:Title year2range+1]] * [[:en:Template:Title year2range-1|Template:Title year2range-1]] * [[:en:Template:Title monthname|Template:Title monthname]] * [[Template:Title decade]] * [[Template:Title century]] * [[:en:Template:Title number|Template:Title number]] * [[:en:Template:Make YYYY–YY|Template:Make YYYY–YY]] * [[Template:Century name from title year]] * [[Template:Century name from title decade]] * [[Template:Century name from decade or year]]<noinclude> {{Documentation}} </noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
revision.text: * [[Template:Title year]] * [[:en:Template:Title year+1|Template:Title year+1]] * [[:en:Template:Title year-1|Template:Title year-1]] * [[:en:Template:Title year range|Template:Title year range]] * [[:en:Template:Title year2range|Template:Title year2range]] * [[:en:Template:Title year2range+1|Template:Title year2range+1]] * [[:en:Template:Title year2range-1|Template:Title year2range-1]] * [[:en:Template:Title monthname|Template:Title monthname]] * [[Template:Title decade]] * [[Template:Title century]] * [[:en:Template:Title number|Template:Title number]] * [[:en:Template:Make YYYY–YY|Template:Make YYYY–YY]] * [[Template:Century name from title year]] * [[Template:Century name from title decade]] * [[Template:Century name from decade or year]]<noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] </noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23630749988|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: * [[Template:Title year]] * [[:en:Template:Title year+1|Template:Title year+1]] * [[:en:Template:Title year-1|Template:Title year-1]] * [[:en:Template:Title year range|Template:Title year range]] * [[:en:Template:Title year2range|Template:Title year2range]] * [[:en:Template:Title year2range+1|Template:Title year2range+1]] * [[:en:Template:Title year2range-1|Template:Title year2range-1]] * [[:en:Template:Title monthname|Template:Title monthname]] * [[Template:Title decade]] * [[Template:Title century]] * [[:en:Template:Title number|Template:Title number]] * [[:en:Template:Make YYYY–YY|Template:Make YYYY–YY]] * [[Template:Century name from title year]] * [[Template:Century name from title decade]] * [[Template:Century name from decade or year]]<noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] </noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
